title: Vunyx's Redstone Pack
description: Compilation of all my Clean Redstone series's features with improvements and more stuff
body:
If you want to publish a project containing my work, please mention my username "Vunyx" somewhere. Also, a link to my project would be much appreciated.

# Description
This resource pack gives a **clean look** to all redstone components, while keeping a **vanilla feel**. It brings features from [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs), such as **directional indicators** for blocks like droppers or observers, and **visual block states** for blocks like note blocks.

List of current features:
- **smooth clean look** for all redstone related blocks (including rails and minecarts too)
- **directional indicators** for dispensers, droppers, hoppers and observers
- **block states indicators** for redstone dust, redstone ore, levers and note blocks
- removes ambiguity between normal and sticky pistons
- **connected outline** for all **wool and glass** blocks (you need [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) or [Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads) for the outlines to connect)
- **3D item models** for all types of torches, repeaters, comparators, levers, tripwire hooks, hoppers and cauldrons

Plans for the future:
- add indicators for cauldrons, composters, beehives and bee nests
- give a clean look to chests and barrels
- versions for 1.13 and older
- reduce file size

### Here is a quick overview of the pack:
![overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ad02d0bfcd2ad53fa978c9fccfe530aa1e4a96ab.png)

### This is how your redstone circuits will look like:
![redstone circuit](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c4e3cb7de07746734bb411e5be3076f5b8720569.png)

![block states and direction indicators](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aac791d5d0a6d8e80e196c22162e8a6b866079b9.png)

### No ambiguity between normal and sticky pistons:
![obvious_sticky.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d1135bd14d1d9740d71b9398446ef057432750e9.png)

### 3D item models:
![3D item models](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/958fb6dd7ee91361f4fd9684a57be4950be697a1.png)

# How to install
After downloading the resource pack, go to **options -> resource packs** and click the **Open Pack Folder** button, or open `%appdata%\.minecraft\resourcepacks` directly. Put the resource pack in this folder. It should then show up under **Available**. Click the arrow to switch it to the **Selected** tab and click **Done**. That's it, the pack should now be installed properly.
